description_long: This is a soft, slouchy beanie hat featuring a camouflage-inspired pattern with earthy tones of green, brown, and beige, interspersed with stylized cartoonish animal faces and mushroom motifs. The knit texture is visible, suggesting a comfortable and flexible fabric construction. A prominent black patch with an embossed frog face logo is sewn onto the front, adding a distinctive branding element. The crown of the hat is rounded and slightly gathered at the top, giving it a relaxed, casual silhouette. The brim is minimal, simply a folded edge that blends seamlessly into the body of the hat. The overall design is playful yet urban, suitable for streetwear or casual outdoor use.
description: A slouchy, knit beanie hat with a camouflage pattern, cartoon animal faces, and a black frog logo patch on the front. The hat has a rounded crown and a minimal folded brim.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black frog logo patch and the main camouflage pattern with visible cartoon faces.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the slouchy, gathered crown and the continuation of the patterned fabric.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rounded, gathered top and the seamless flow of the pattern around the crown.
description_view_3: Right-side view emphasizing the minimal folded brim and the playful pattern wrapping around the hat.
